query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT title SEPARATOR ' | ') as sample_titles FROM catalog_masters WHERE isbn13 IS NULL OR isbn13 = '' OR LENGTH(isbn13) < 10 LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xbcpjkj7urB6FV.123b8c0ef218 --database JSmQWHzFMNuBrpEm7nuLv4 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT title SEPARATOR ' | ') as sample_titles FROM catalog_masters WHERE isbn13 IS NULL OR isbn13 = '' OR LENGTH(isbn13) < 10 LIMIT 5
